stemHtml: The formation of a lee low may happen if a current of air flows towards…

options.a: the south along a coastline, in northern latitudes, and to the north, in southern latitudes.
options.b: the east, perpendicular to a north-south-oriented mountain range that forms a barrier.
options.c: a large canyon with a river originating from a glacier.
options.d: the east or the west along an east-west-oriented mountain ridge.
